forbidden_capabilities: fabricated source weight, tokenizer, model-card, license, conversion, quantization, upload or restore evidence
execution of conversion or quantization argv read from an authority or manifest by the verifier
acceptance of a model bundle without every registered source weight shard and shard index
mixing Mistral consolidated.safetensors with the governed Hugging Face shard/index layout
committed model weights, GGUF files, compiled binaries, source archives or external evidence payloads
benchmark, model admission, production readiness or operational attestation claim
acceptance: v1 remains available and unchanged while the independent v2 contract is fail-closed
strict JSON parsing rejects duplicate and unknown keys at every governed object
Qwen authority contains every weight shard, shard index, tokenizer/config file and model card
Mistral authority requires tokenizer.model and explicitly excludes consolidated.safetensors with rationale
a complete bundle cannot verify without exact remote inventory and all selected source files
human legal review, verified AP-13B.2b package and four binary identities are mandatory
conversion and every quantization bind exact source, toolchain, argv, logs and GGUF digests
remote inventory evidence semantically binds exact model_id, revision, source_uri, observed_at and every authority entry
human legal review records bind conditions, ATTRIBUTED_RECORD or SIGNED_RECORD provenance, immutable attestation_reference and exact license text SHA-256
toolchain and storage locators bind exact package/archive SHA-256 while uploaded_at, retention_days, retention_expires_at and restored_at enforce the retention interval
immutable upload and independent restore re-verification are mandatory
canonical authority, manifest and verification-report digests are emitted
both committed model baselines remain PENDING_ACQUISITION and return exit code 2
Ruff, strict mypy, full pytest with coverage and repository security/runtime gates pass
